title: Company Names Tribunal decision: KaptialIQ Ltd
body: "Application number 5465  Applicant S&P Global Inc objected to the name used by KaptialIQ Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 January 2026 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of KaptialIQ Ltd is changed to 16138317 Ltd. "
